name: og-simplify
description: Resurrected /simplify: reviews changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency via three parallel agents, then fixes what they find.

interface.shortDescription: Review and clean up your changed code, then fix it.
interface.longDescription: Launches three parallel agents — reuse, quality, efficiency — over your git diff, aggregates findings, and applies the fixes.
defaultPrompt: Clean up the code I just changed.
Review my diff for reuse, quality, and efficiency and fix what you find.
Run a high-effort cleanup pass on my changes.
